requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Spectrum Emissions Compliance (TRC / SASMO)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC/无线电频谱辐射合规（TRC / SASMO）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC/無線電頻譜輻射合規（TRC / SASMO）

summary.en: Wireless devices imported into Syria must comply with electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) requirements and radio frequency emissions limits as referenced by TRC and SASMO. Syria aligns technically with ITU-R recommendations and Arab regional telecom standards (the Arab Spectrum Management Group — ASMG — issues regional spectrum decisions that Syria participates in). EMC test reports demonstrating conformity to ITU or equivalent standards are required as part of the TRC type approval dossier. Spurious emissions, conducted emissions, and radiated emissions must be within permitted limits. SASMO may reference EN or IEC standards for EMC as technical baselines, though SASMO-specific published standards should be confirmed directly. SCFA coordinates on infrastructure-protection requirements for equipment connected to the national telecom network.
summary.zh: 进口至叙利亚的无线设备须符合TRC和SASMO参考的电磁兼容（EMC）要求及无线电频率辐射限值。叙利亚在技术上与ITU-R建议及阿拉伯地区电信标准保持一致（阿拉伯频谱管理组织ASMG发布叙利亚参与的地区频谱决定）。作为TRC型号认证文件的一部分，须提供符合ITU或同等标准的EMC测试报告。杂散辐射、传导辐射和辐射发射须在允许限值内。SASMO可能参考EN或IEC标准作为EMC技术基准，但应直接确认SASMO具体发布的标准。SCFA就接入国家电信网络的设备的基础设施保护要求进行协调。
summary.zht: 進口至敘利亞的無線設備須符合TRC和SASMO參考的電磁相容（EMC）要求及無線電頻率輻射限值。敘利亞在技術上與ITU-R建議及阿拉伯地區電信標準保持一致（阿拉伯頻譜管理組織ASMG發布敘利亞參與的地區頻譜決定）。作為TRC型號認證文件的一部分，須提供符合ITU或同等標準的EMC測試報告。雜散輻射、傳導輻射和輻射發射須在允許限值內。SASMO可能參考EN或IEC標準作為EMC技術基準，但應直接確認SASMO具體發布的標準。SCFA就接入國家電信網絡的設備的基礎設施保護要求進行協調。

standards_or_laws: TRC Type Approval Technical Requirements (هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات)
SASMO — Syrian Arab Organization for Standardization and Metrology (national EMC standards)
ITU-R SM.329 (Unwanted emissions in the spurious domain)
ITU-R SM.1541 (Unwanted emissions in the out-of-band domain)

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless devices is covered by SRRC radio type approval (frequency-specific emissions limits) and CCC certification referencing GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment EMC) and GB/T 6113 series (radio disturbance measurement). MIIT NAL testing also includes EMC parameters for telecom terminal equipment. These Chinese EMC test reports can provide baseline technical data but must be re-assessed against TRC / SASMO / ITU requirements for Syria.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备的EMC合规由SRRC无线电型号认证（特定频率辐射限值）及参考GB/T 9254（信息技术设备EMC）和GB/T 6113系列（无线电干扰测量）的CCC认证覆盖。工信部NAL测试也包含电信终端设备的EMC参数。这些中国EMC测试报告可提供基线技术数据，但须针对叙利亚的TRC/SASMO/ITU要求重新评估。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備的EMC合規由SRRC無線電型號認證（特定頻率輻射限值）及參考GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備EMC）和GB/T 6113系列（無線電干擾測量）的CCC認證覆蓋。工信部NAL測試也包含電信終端設備的EMC參數。這些中國EMC測試報告可提供基線技術數據，但須針對敘利亞的TRC/SASMO/ITU要求重新評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval (frequency-specific emissions limits)
CCC — GB/T 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics)
CCC — GB/T 6113 series (Radio disturbance measurement procedures)
MIIT NAL test requirements (EMC parameters for telecom terminal equipment)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 and GB/T 6113-based CCC EMC test reports are not directly accepted by TRC or SASMO. New test reports against ITU-R emissions limits or SASMO-referenced standards must be produced and submitted as part of the TRC type approval dossier. Existing Chinese SRRC test data may provide useful baseline documentation but is not a substitute. Confirm specific SASMO standard numbers and TRC dossier format requirements directly with TRC or a qualified Syrian regulatory agent.
gap.zh: 基于中国GB/T 9254和GB/T 6113的CCC EMC测试报告不被TRC或SASMO直接接受。须针对ITU-R辐射限值或SASMO参考标准出具新的测试报告，并作为TRC型号认证文件的一部分提交。现有中国SRRC测试数据可提供有用的基线文件，但不可作为替代。应直接向TRC或合格的叙利亚监管代理确认具体SASMO标准编号和TRC文件格式要求。
gap.zht: 基於中國GB/T 9254和GB/T 6113的CCC EMC測試報告不被TRC或SASMO直接接受。須針對ITU-R輻射限值或SASMO參考標準出具新的測試報告，並作為TRC型號認證文件的一部分提交。現有中國SRRC測試數據可提供有用的基線文件，但不可作為替代。應直接向TRC或合格的敘利亞監管代理確認具體SASMO標準編號和TRC文件格式要求。

source.publisher: TRC — Telecommunications Regulatory Commission of Syria (هيئة تنظيم قطاع الاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to ITU-R and SASMO-referenced standards is mandatory as part of the TRC type approval application for all wireless devices imported into Syria. Chinese CCC EMC reports are not accepted substitutes. New ITU-referenced test reports are required. Confirm specific standard references and dossier requirements with TRC directly.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于所有进口至叙利亚的无线设备，符合ITU-R和SASMO参考标准的EMC合规是TRC型号认证申请的强制要求。中国CCC EMC报告不可作为替代。须提供新的ITU参考测试报告。应直接向TRC确认具体标准参考和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於所有進口至敘利亞的無線設備，符合ITU-R和SASMO參考標準的EMC合規是TRC型號認證申請的強制要求。中國CCC EMC報告不可作為替代。須提供新的ITU參考測試報告。應直接向TRC確認具體標準參考和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Frequency (RF) Interference and SCFA Network Protection
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频率干扰与SCFA网络保护
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻率干擾與SCFA網絡保護

summary.en: Wireless devices operating in Syria must not cause harmful interference to the national telecom network infrastructure managed by SCFA or to other licensed spectrum users. TRC manages spectrum allocation in accordance with ITU Radio Regulations and Arab regional (ASMG) spectrum decisions. Devices must operate only within TRC-permitted frequency bands and within the transmitted power limits specified in the TRC type approval. Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz (IEEE 802.11 b/g/n) is generally in use; 5 GHz WLAN (IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax) sub-band availability and power limits must be confirmed with TRC. Cellular frequency band plans follow ITU/Arab regional allocations — band compatibility with Syrian mobile network operators (Syriatel, MTN Syria) must be verified. Devices that can only operate on unsupported frequency bands may not be legally usable even if otherwise approved.
summary.zh: 在叙利亚运行的无线设备不得对SCFA管理的国家电信网络基础设施或其他获许可频谱用户造成有害干扰。TRC依据ITU无线电规则和阿拉伯地区（ASMG）频谱决定管理频谱分配。设备须仅在TRC允许的频段内运行，且在TRC型号认证规定的发射功率限值内。Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n）通常已在使用；5 GHz WLAN（IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax）子频段可用性和功率限值须向TRC确认。蜂窝频段规划遵循ITU/阿拉伯地区分配 — 须核实与叙利亚移动网络运营商（Syriatel、MTN Syria）的频段兼容性。仅能在不支持频段运行的设备即使获得其他批准也可能无法合法使用。
summary.zht: 在敘利亞運行的無線設備不得對SCFA管理的國家電信網絡基礎設施或其他獲許可頻譜用戶造成有害干擾。TRC依據ITU無線電規則和阿拉伯地區（ASMG）頻譜決定管理頻譜分配。設備須僅在TRC允許的頻段內運行，且在TRC型號認證規定的發射功率限值內。Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz（IEEE 802.11 b/g/n）通常已在使用；5 GHz WLAN（IEEE 802.11 a/n/ac/ax）子頻段可用性和功率限值須向TRC確認。蜂窩頻段規劃遵循ITU/阿拉伯地區分配 — 須核實與敘利亞移動網絡運營商（Syriatel、MTN Syria）的頻段相容性。僅能在不支持頻段運行的設備即使獲得其他批准也可能無法合法使用。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations (harmful interference definition and obligations)
ASMG Arab regional spectrum decisions (Arab frequency plan)
TRC spectrum allocation and frequency assignment decisions
SCFA national telecom network protection requirements

summary.en: In China, SRRC radio type approval specifies the permitted frequency bands and maximum EIRP/conducted power for each approved product. Chinese frequency allocations follow ITU Radio Regulations adapted for China via MIIT. Band plans differ between China and Syria — in particular, some Chinese LTE/NR band combinations are not deployed in Syrian networks. Chinese 5 GHz WLAN channel plans (SRRC) may differ from Syrian TRC allocations.
summary.zh: 在中国，SRRC无线电型号认证规定每个经批准产品的允许频段和最大EIRP/传导功率。中国频率分配遵循通过工信部适应中国国情的ITU无线电规则。中叙频段规划有所不同 — 特别是某些中国LTE/NR频段组合未在叙利亚网络中部署。中国5 GHz WLAN信道规划（SRRC）可能与叙利亚TRC分配有所不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，SRRC無線電型號認證規定每個經批准產品的允許頻段和最大EIRP/傳導功率。中國頻率分配遵循通過工信部適應中國國情的ITU無線電規則。中敘頻段規劃有所不同 — 特別是某些中國LTE/NR頻段組合未在敘利亞網絡中部署。中國5 GHz WLAN信道規劃（SRRC）可能與敘利亞TRC分配有所不同。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval (frequency bands and power limits per approved model)

gap.en: Frequency band plans differ between China and Syria. Chinese SRRC approval does not guarantee that the device operates within TRC-permitted bands or within Syrian power limits. Cellular band compatibility with Syriatel and MTN Syria must be verified model-by-model. 5 GHz WLAN sub-band permission in Syria must be confirmed with TRC before import. Devices with fixed firmware that cannot disable unsupported bands may fail TRC assessment.
gap.zh: 中叙两国频段规划不同。中国SRRC批准不保证设备在TRC允许频段内或叙利亚功率限值内运行。须逐型号核实与Syriatel和MTN Syria的蜂窝频段兼容性。叙利亚5 GHz WLAN子频段许可须在进口前向TRC确认。固件固定、无法禁用不支持频段的设备可能无法通过TRC评估。
gap.zht: 中敘兩國頻段規劃不同。中國SRRC批准不保證設備在TRC允許頻段內或敘利亞功率限值內運行。須逐型號核實與Syriatel和MTN Syria的蜂窩頻段相容性。敘利亞5 GHz WLAN子頻段許可須在進口前向TRC確認。固件固定、無法禁用不支持頻段的設備可能無法通過TRC評估。

source.publisher: ITU-R — International Telecommunication Union Radiocommunication Sector

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless devices must operate within TRC-permitted frequency bands and power limits in Syria. Chinese SRRC frequency approvals do not transfer. Cellular band compatibility with Syrian operators (Syriatel, MTN Syria) must be verified. Confirm 5 GHz WLAN sub-band permissions with TRC prior to any import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线设备在叙利亚须在TRC允许的频段和功率限值内运行。中国SRRC频率批准不可转用。须核实与叙利亚运营商（Syriatel、MTN Syria）的蜂窝频段兼容性。进口前须向TRC确认5 GHz WLAN子频段许可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線設備在敘利亞須在TRC允許的頻段和功率限值內運行。中國SRRC頻率批准不可轉用。須核實與敘利亞運營商（Syriatel、MTN Syria）的蜂窩頻段相容性。進口前須向TRC確認5 GHz WLAN子頻段許可。
